nuitka-compilation-report.exit_message: Failed unexpectedly in Scons C backend compilation.

scons_error_report.stderr: In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/Python.h:12, from /mnt/d/project/xiongjing/excel-compare-tool/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nuitka/build/include/nuitka/prelude.h:46, from __helpers.c:4:/usr/include/python3.12/pyconfig.h:120:3: error: #error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h 120 | # error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h | ^~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/pyport.h:4, from /usr/include/python3.12/Python.h:38:/usr/include/python3.12/pyconfig.h:120:3: error: #error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h 120 | # error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h | ^~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/objimpl.h:227, from /usr/include/python3.12/Python.h:45:/usr/include/python3.12/cpython/objimpl.h: In function '_PyObject_VAR_SIZE':/usr/include/python3.12/cpython/objimpl.h:26:12: error: 'SIZEOF_VOID_P' undeclared (first use in this function) 26 | return _Py_SIZE_ROUND_UP(size, SIZEOF_VOID_P); | ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/Python.h:51:/usr/include/python3.12/unicodeobject.h: At top level:/usr/include/python3.12/unicodeobject.h:68:2: error: #error Must define SIZEOF_WCHAR_T 68 | #error Must define SIZEOF_WCHAR_T | ^~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/pythread.h:128, from /usr/include/python3.12/Python.h:89:/usr/include/python3.12/cpython/pythread.h:27:5: error: #error "Require native threads. See https://bugs.python.org/issue31370" 27 | # error "Require native threads. See https://bugs.python.org/issue31370" | ^~~~~/usr/include/python3.12/cpython/pythread.h:36:5: error: unknown type name 'NATIVE_TSS_KEY_T' 36 | NATIVE_TSS_KEY_T _key; | ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_atomic.h:12, from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_runtime.h:12, from /mnt/d/project/xiongjing/excel-compare-tool/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nuitka/build/include/nuitka/prelude.h:107:/usr/include/python3.12/pyconfig.h:120:3: error: #error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h 120 | # error unknown multiarch location for pyconfig.h | ^~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_ceval_state.h:13, from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_runtime.h:13:/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_gil.h:37:5: error: unknown type name 'pthread_cond_t' 37 | PyCOND_T cond; | ^~~~~~~~/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_gil.h:38:5: error: unknown type name 'pthread_mutex_t' 38 | PyMUTEX_T mutex; | ^~~~~~~~~/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_gil.h:42:5: error: unknown type name 'pthread_cond_t' 42 | PyCOND_T switch_cond; | ^~~~~~~~/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_gil.h:43:5: error: unknown type name 'pthread_mutex_t' 43 | PyMUTEX_T switch_mutex; | ^~~~~~~~~In file included from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_interp.h:31, from /usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_runtime.h:18:/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_obmalloc.h:567:2: error: #error "obmalloc radix tree requires 64-bit or 32-bit pointers." 567 | #error "obmalloc radix tree requires 64-bit or 32-bit pointers." | ^~~~~/usr/include/python3.12/internal/pycore_obmalloc.h:629:29: error: 'POINTER_BITS' undeclared here (not in a function); did you mean 'POINTER_INFO'?
